hero.description: Orvex Visuals is a Bangalore-based photography and videography studio passionate about turning your life's most precious moments into timeless visual stories.
proofPoints: Edited photos in {PHOTO_DELIVERY_DAYS} working days. Videos in {VIDEO_DELIVERY_DAYS} working days.
Transparent GST-inclusive pricing with a written booking summary.
Your delivered photos and videos remain yours with no surprise licensing restrictions.
hero.proofNote: We removed unverified review counts and stock team imagery so this page reflects only claims we can support in production.

story.title: From Passion to Profession
paragraphs: Orvex Visuals started with a simple belief - every moment deserves to be captured beautifully, and professional photography should not cost a fortune. Founded in Bangalore in 2020, we set out to make world-class photography accessible to everyone.
What began as a one-person passion project has grown into a booking-first studio experience focused on transparent planning, fast delivery, and clean communication from inquiry to final handoff.

Our philosophy is simple: combine artistic vision with technical excellence, keep pricing transparent (all GST-inclusive, no surprises), and treat every client like family. We are not just photographers - we are visual storytellers who happen to have cameras.

items.title: Detail-Oriented
items.description: We obsess over every frame, every angle, every edit to ensure perfection.

items.title: Transparent Pricing
items.description: All prices are GST-inclusive. What we quote is what you pay. No surprises.

items.title: Pro Equipment

items.title: Always On Time

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.body: When you use our booking form, contact form, or WhatsApp, we may collect your name, phone number, email address (optional), event details (date, venue, type), and budget preferences. We do not collect payment card information. Payments, if applicable, are handled separately via UPI or bank transfer.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.body: We use your information to respond to your inquiry, prepare estimates or booking summaries, coordinate your photography session, and continue the conversation over WhatsApp, email, or phone when needed. We never sell or rent your personal data for third-party marketing.

sections.title: 3. Photos and Media
sections.body: Photos and videos captured during your event are delivered exclusively to you. We may use select images (with your consent) for our portfolio, website gallery, and social media. You may opt out of portfolio usage at any time by informing us in writing.

sections.title: 4. Data Storage and Security
sections.body: Inquiry and booking details submitted through the site may be stored in secured systems that are accessible only to authorized team members. Some conversations may continue on WhatsApp or email after submission. Media retention and archival timelines can vary by project and are confirmed directly with the client instead of being guaranteed globally on the site.

sections.title: 5. Cookies and Analytics
sections.body: Our website uses essential cookies and Vercel Analytics to understand traffic patterns. We do not use third-party advertising trackers. Analytics data is anonymized and cannot identify individual users.

sections.title: 6. Third-Party Services
sections.body: We use services such as WhatsApp Business (Meta) for communication, Firebase/Firestore for inquiry and booking storage, Google Drive or similar delivery tools for media handoff, and Vercel for hosting. Each service has its own privacy policy governing its handling of data.

sections.title: 7. Your Rights
sections.body: You may request: access to your stored data, correction of inaccurate data, deletion of your data, or withdrawal of portfolio consent at any time.

sections.title: 8. Contact
sections.bodyTemplate: For privacy concerns, email us at {EMAIL} or message us on WhatsApp at {PHONE_DISPLAY}.

sections.title: 1. Services
sections.body: Orvex Visuals provides photography and videography coordination services in Bangalore and surrounding areas. We connect you with professional, vetted photographers from our curated network to cover your events.

sections.title: 2. Booking and Payment
sections.body: A booking is confirmed upon receipt of 30% advance payment. The remaining balance is due on the day of the event before the shoot begins. We accept UPI, NEFT/IMPS bank transfer, and cash. All prices are inclusive of GST (18%).

sections.title: 3. Cancellation and Refunds
list: 7+ days before event: Full refund of advance
3-7 days before event: 50% refund of advance
Less than 3 days: No refund (team is already reserved)
Date change: Free if requested 5+ days in advance (subject to availability)

sections.title: 4. Delivery
sections.bodyTemplate: Edited photos are delivered within {PHOTO_DELIVERY_DAYS} working days via online gallery. Videos are delivered within {VIDEO_DELIVERY_DAYS} working days. Rush delivery may be available for specific packages. One round of revisions is included where applicable.

sections.title: 5. Copyright and Usage
sections.body: You receive full personal usage rights to all delivered photos and videos. Orvex Visuals retains the right to use select images for portfolio, marketing, and social media purposes unless you opt out in writing before the event. Commercial usage by the client requires separate written agreement.

sections.title: 6. Limitations of Liability
sections.body: While we take every precaution, Orvex Visuals is not liable for: unforeseen equipment failure beyond backup coverage, venue/weather restrictions preventing coverage, delays caused by event schedule changes, or loss/damage of delivered files after handover to client.

sections.title: 7. Client Responsibilities
sections.body: Clients are expected to: provide accurate event details at booking, inform us of any venue restrictions or special requirements, ensure photographer access to key moments, and communicate schedule changes promptly.

sections.title: 8. Force Majeure
sections.body: Neither party is liable for failure to perform due to circumstances beyond reasonable control including natural disasters, government restrictions, pandemics, or civil unrest. In such cases, we will offer a full reschedule or refund.

sections.title: 9. Disputes
sections.body: Any disputes shall be resolved amicably through discussion. If unresolved, disputes are subject to the jurisdiction of courts in Bangalore, Karnataka, India.

sections.title: 10. Contact
sections.bodyTemplate: For questions about these terms, email {EMAIL} or call {PHONE_DISPLAY}.
